title: Add offline session resume dry-run JSON
goal: Add the next issue #4 headless runtime slice: `jcode-harness session resume <id> --dry-run --json`, a safe envelope for local jcode session resume orchestration.
completionConditions: Command validates a local jcode session and emits stable resume argv/cwd metadata
Omitting `--dry-run` fails safely without starting TUI/provider
Focused e2e, fmt/check, selfdev build/reload, commit and push pass
failureTaxonomy: Accidentally starting TUI/provider instead of dry-run
Resume argv may drift from jcode CLI args
notes: Keep actual resume execution unsupported in this slice. This command only validates and returns a stable plan/envelope for external orchestrators.
